## The Mutation

Describe the changes made in this Pull Request. What entropy is this resolving? What biological fitness does it add?

## Validation

Code that does not compile is just noise. 
- [ ] I have verified this compiles (`cargo build --workspace`).
- [ ] I have verified this passes the linter (`cargo clippy --workspace`).
- [ ] I have minimized memory allocations and optimized for performance.

## Notes for the Reviewer

Provide any signal that will help the reviewer process this mutation faster. Do not defend your ego, defend the code.
